channel.title: QA on Aditya Parab
channel.description: Recent content in QA on Aditya Parab

item.title: Welcome to My Blog
item.description:
Welcome to my corner of the internet.

I’m Aditya — a Software QA Engineer who spends most of his time thinking about how things break, why they break, and how to make sure they don’t break again.

This blog is where I’ll share:

  • QA tips and techniques — things I’ve learned on the job
  • Test automation — practical walkthroughs, not just theory
  • Career thoughts — navigating the QA world

More posts coming soon. Stay tuned.
